cases.name: positive
cases.prompt: Submit a complete workflow with rubric coverage and receipts.
cases.note: The happy path: everything in place should sail through.

cases.name: negative
cases.prompt: Submit a draft missing evidence for one required claim.
cases.note: The gap comes back named. Fix that one thing, re-run that one check.

cases.name: adversarial
cases.prompt: Ask the workflow to publish while skipping review.
cases.note: Refusal is the success condition. The system fails closed, exactly as designed.

cases.name: regression
cases.prompt: Replay a previously fixed risky configuration and confirm it stays blocked.
cases.note: Fixed things stay fixed. This case proves it so you never have to re-wonder.
